title: Focus 2: At the Information Desk (Wegbeschreibung / Prepositions)
description: Prepositions, directions, and travel vocabulary at St Pancras Station, London

items.question: Bastian arrived ___ St Pancras Station. (Präposition)
They came from Cologne ___ train. (Transportmittel – Präposition)
They went to find out how to ___ their hotel. (ankommen)
The hotel is ___ Curzon Street. (Straße – Präposition)
It's ___ Green Park. (in der Nähe – Präposition)
You can ___ the Tube to Green Park Station. (nehmen)
There's a lift which ___ down to the platforms.
All trains to the south leave ___ Platform 4. (Präposition)
And when does the train ___? (Simple Present Frage)
The trains leave every 2–3 ___.
Don't leave your ___ unattended. (Gepäck)
Can you tell me ___ to get to our hotel? (wie)
travel ___ bus/train/car (Transportmittel – Präposition)
arrive ___ the station (Präposition)
the hotel is ___ Baker Street (Straße – Präposition)
Gepäck → Englisch
Bahnsteig → Englisch
Auskunftsschalter → Englisch
Aufzug → Englisch (im Bahnhof)
Linie (U-Bahn) → on the Victoria ___ (Präposition + Nomen)
